content: I learned that meaningful work is rarely just about a title. The moments that mattered most were when I built something useful, explained it clearly, and helped someone else become more confident.
title: Career reflection

content: If I had to leave one piece of advice, it would be this: stay honest about what you know, be gentle with people who are learning, and do the small consistent things even when nobody is watching.
title: Advice I want remembered
